_about: Fill this ONCE from the AWS console (view access is enough). The agent reuses it for every deployment in this account. See the skill's references/account-defaults.md. No secrets here. IBM IDs are referenced by SSM Parameter Store NAME (ibm_*_ssm) so the values stay out of this repo - create those SecureString params and grant the deploy role ssm:GetParameter + kms:Decrypt. To embed the IDs literally instead, replace the ibm_*_ssm fields with ibm_customer_id / ibm_site_id.
